tools.name: search_settlements
tools.description: Search currently-open US class-action settlements you may be able to claim for free. Filter by keyword (company/brand), category (e.g. data-breach, privacy, junk-fees), and whether proof is required. Returns each settlement's payout, claim deadline, days-left, proof requirement, category, and offici

tools.name: unclaimed_money_portal
tools.description: Get the official, free unclaimed-property (unclaimed money) search portal for a US state plus the national NAUPA/missingmoney.com link. Use to direct someone to where they can search for forgotten bank accounts, refunds, etc.
